modal.title: Reset password
modal.description: Enter your email address and we will send you instructions to reset your password.
modal.successMessage: If the email address is registered in our system, you will receive instructions to reset your password.

strength.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
strength.needNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
strength.needCase: Password must contain both uppercase and lowercase letters.
strength.needSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character.
